title: Top row strong fingers: R U E I T Y
description: Move UP to the top row with your strongest fingers: index (R U T Y) and middle (E I)
text: rite tire tree tried trust three fried glide grid dirty fairy hardy gear
finger_focus: Top row index (R U T Y) + middle (E I)

tips.text: Strongest fingers reach UP first: index (R, U, T, Y) and middle (E, I)
Reach up, then snap straight back to the home row

tips.hint: Top row index (R U T Y) + middle (E I)

character_tips.anna: Top row begins with your strongest fingers. Reach up, return home.
character_tips.maxim: Index and middle lead the top row: R U T Y, then E I. Logical and strong.
character_tips.knopych: TOP ROW UNLOCKED! ⬆️ Strong fingers reach first!
character_tips.klavochka: Tippy-toes for your strongest fingers, my dear 🌷
